title: Voidds PvP & Utils
description: A Netherite-Focused pack that keeps the Vanilla 16x16 feel
body:
Want a PvP resource pack that isn't 'over the top' or increased resolutions like 32x32, 48x48, and so on. Well this is the pvp resource pack for you!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This Resource pack has Vanilla like textures, like grey-er Netherite items, grey-scale Crystals, Totems, EXP bottles and multiple more, while mantaining consistancy with other items like the Shovel! Hardcore Hearts and white Hardcore absorption hearts, and better hotbar & Exp bar matches exp bottles. 
![Full texture list:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c40225a23f29cf057ab98e71c37294dc8a05a9b3.png)
